note.FR: Meilleure arme support. Degats de competence +40% et buff Intensite sur CRIT Hydro.
note.EN: Best support weapon. Skill Damage +40% and Skill Intensity buff on Hydro CRIT.

note.FR: Arme signature. Probabilite de declenchement et ATQ allies.
note.EN: Signature weapon. Trigger Probability and allies ATK boost.

note.FR: Duree +30%. CRITs donnent un buff aleatoire aux allies.
note.EN: Duration +30%. CRITs randomly grant allies a buff.

note.FR: Focus Degats de competence et Duree. 4x Blaze Inspo.
note.EN: Focus Skill DMG and Duration. 4x Blaze Inspo.

note.FR: Buff principal : Tentacules + Degats de competence equipe.
note.EN: Primary buff: Tentacles + team Skill DMG.

note.FR: Passif : genere des Tentacules via CRITs (max 18).

notes.FR: Tabethe est un support Degats de competence. Deployez-la comme Partenaire de Combat. Armes a distance pour generer des Tentacules via CRITs (max 18). Ultime pour 9 supplementaires. Avec Lady Nifle/Rebecca + Fushu.
notes.EN: Tabethe is a Skill DMG support. Deploy as Combat Partner. Ranged weapons to generate Tentacles via CRITs (max 18). Ultimate for 9 more. With Lady Nifle/Rebecca + Fushu.
